sections.2_obligations: Receiving party shall hold Confidential Information in strict confidence and use it only for the Purpose. No exceptions for residual knowledge.
sections.3_term: Confidentiality obligations survive for five (5) years.
sections.4_exclusions: Confidential Information does not include information that (a) was publicly known, (b) was already known to the receiving party, (c) was independently developed.
sections.5_return: Upon termination, receiving party shall destroy or return all Confidential Information.
sections.6_remedies: Disclosing party may seek injunctive relief for breach.
sections.7_assignment: Neither party may assign without the other's consent.
sections.8_governing_law: This Agreement is governed by New York law.
